description: Fabric8 Kubernetes Model RBAC provides Java model classes and builders for Kubernetes role-based access control resources such as Roles, ClusterRoles, RoleBindings, and ClusterRoleBindings. It is part of the Fabric8 Kubernetes Client model set and lets JVM applications serialize, deserialize, and construct Kubernetes RBAC API objects.

Fabric8 Kubernetes Model RBAC provides Java model classes for Kubernetes role-based access control resources such as Roles, ClusterRoles, RoleBindings, and ClusterRoleBindings. It is part of the Fabric8 Kubernetes Client model set and is used to serialize, deserialize, and manipulate Kubernetes RBAC API objects in JVM applications.
